lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

lists.37909: High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring
lists.37896: Seat belt telltale command monitoring (external telltale)

lists.37909: High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring
lists.37896: Seat belt telltale command monitoring (external telltale)

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Language_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

CarburationType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

DistanceUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the distance unit type (km or miles).

VolumeUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit of the vehicle.

TripComputerType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

TyrePressureUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the tyre pressure unit displayed.

ParkingBrakeType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

OverspeedWarningPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

VolumeFuelWarning_CF.comment: used to define the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

TripDistanceKm.comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

TripFuelUsed.comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

TripTimer.comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

L0Value.comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

NumberIntendedResets.comment: Number of reset with BURAM loss caused by power supply loss

lists.2: Circuit short to battery or open circuit

lists.5: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance ranges)

UPAMMI_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of UPAMMI

TPMSMMI_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMSMMI

ESCMMI_CF.comment: This parameter is used for ESC message filtering(only 20403_4)

ExternalTemperature_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.

TemperatureUnit_CF.comment: Defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU

DimmingStrategy_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define which kind of dimmer is used in the vehicle

lists.0: Without R// or DIAG by CAN

NivocodSensorType_CF.comment: whether or not brake fluid level sensor has // resistor to distinguish normaly open circ vs no senso

MSCOilChgInitialDistanceInKM_CF.comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualDistanceInKM !

MSCOilChgInitialPeriodInDay_CF.comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay !

MSCOilChgUsualDistanceInKM.comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in km.

MSCServiceInitialDistanceInKM_CF.comment: distance which will be considerer in SERV Distance counter when a service reset procedure is perform

MSCServiceInitialPeriodInDay_CF.comment: duration which will be considerer in SERVTime counter when a service reset procedure is performed

MSCServiceUsualDistanceInKM.comment: This is the current value displayed for the Service Schedule Change in km.

MSCServiceUsualPeriodInDay.comment: This is the current value displayed for the Service Schedule Change in day.

PWMDimmingOutputDutyCycle.comment: effective PWM Dimming output duty cycle

FrontSBRInhibition_CF.comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of sound only for Front SBR warning (10104,10105)

lists.7: Overflow of Electrical consumption value (EV specific)

WelcomeSequenceInhibition_CF.comment: This configuration is used to activate or deactivate the welcome sequence

SpeedScaleType_CF.comment: used adapt cluster HMI (virtual pointer scale) to vehicle max speed (depends on engine)

VehicleGUIStyle_CF.comment: Allows to change the representation of the vehicle in the graphism shown in the TFT

TACStrategy_CF.comment: This parameter allows to select which filtering strategy of RPM pointer shall be used.

OilLevelPresent_CF.comment: Allows identifying the presence of oil level management (10102_x) and DTC management

MSCOilChgWarningThresholdKM_CF.comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet

lists.3: present with OCS and cluster internal counter

MSCOilDistanceCounterPresent_CF.comment: to define if Draining distance counter is displayed on Cluster and value computation strategy

MSCOilTimeCounterPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define if Draining timer is displayed

MSCServDistanceCounterPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define if Service distance counter is displayed

MSCServTimeCounterPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define if Service timer is displayed

MSCServiceWarningThresholdKM_CF.comment: Used to define the first warning threshold for Service schedule in kilometer.

FuelRangeCorrectKmAutonom_CF.comment: Define what t is the distance range on which the driving range is computed. Cf. Data doc field

TCI_RemainingDistanceIncreaseInhibitionT.comment: This configuration parameter is used to forbid the incrementation of the DTE

TCI_RemainingDistanceWarningThreshold_CF.comment: This configuration is used to forbid the incrementation of the DTE

TelltaleAutotestP1_CF.ADAS_HandsOFFdetec.comment: This parameter is used to activate optional telltales autotest test when Ignition is switched ON.

lists.6: With MEX Light - ECO Only C1AHS

MexType_CF.comment: Used to identifying the management of the current driving mode

S1Kmin_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as a weighting(usually <1)to the fuel consumption for L2 computation

S1Kmaj_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as a weighting(usually >1)to the fuel consumption for L2 computation

S2Kmin_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as a weighting(usually <1)to the fuel consumption for L2 computation

S2Kmaj_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as a weighting(usually >1)to the fuel consumption for L2 computation

S3Kmin_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as a weighting(usually <1)to the fuel consumption for L2 computation

S3Kmaj_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as a weighting(usually >1)to the fuel consumption for L2 computation

TripFuelLPG.comment: Used for LPG trip computer calculations

TripFuelCNG.comment: Used for CNG trip computer calculations

L3DuringFuelReadjust.comment: This parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update what

L2offDuringFuelReadjust.comment: This parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update w

L0onDuringFuelReadjust.comment: This parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update wh

ExtECUDistBeforeReadjust.comment: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence)

lists.5: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance range)

VacuumPumpSafety_CF.comment: identifying the activation of the safetybag function for EV/HEV/PHEV vehicle with vacuum pump

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

DIM_OutputWhenDayNightOnly_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define backlight level during night in Day/Night mode

DIM_DayNightModifiedByPCFN_CF.comment: This configuration used to force dimming off when PCFN/DisplayRequest =0.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

ClusterDistBeforeReadjust.comment: Cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN or cluster incoherence)

ClockDisplayMode_CF.comment: This parameter allows to display the clock info in different format dpending on market requirements.

lists.1: Clock Displayed from CAN / RTC OFF
lists.2: Clock displayed / Not set / RTC ON
lists.3: Clock displayed and set / RTC ON
lists.4: Clock display and set / RTC in Radio

Clock_CF.comment: Allows identifying the display AND management (includes setting) of the clock (CodingInstructions!)

ChargingPlugTelltaleVariant_CF.comment: Used to choose the color of the telltale "Charging plug"

ATBeepInR_CF.comment: Used to allow to emit a sound in case of AT switched to R.

lists.7: Overflow of electrical consumption value (EV specific)

CauseOfLastTripComputerGasReset.comment: This parameter is used for LPG/CNG trip computer reset causes monitoring

lists.7: Overflow of electrical consumption value (EV specific)

CauseOfLastTripComputerGlobalReset.comment: This parameter is used for Global trip computer reset causes monitoring (concerns avg speed)

OutputControl_Backlight.Value.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

lists.0: All pointers are at rest position

SCRPageMMI_CF.comment: This parameter is used to define which SCR ADAC page is available

PCFNEVChargingModeIHMStrategy_CF.comment: This parameter is used to define the strategy used for EV charge display.

RegulEVInfosMMI_CF.comment: indicates the presence or not of a specific EV infos page for a regulatory need in some countries

GAU_TempoForVU_CF.comment: Used to adapt fuel stabilization temporization to LCV/CDV (big fuel tanks)

EthernetPresent_CF.comment: Used to activate / deactivate ethernet link and allow to raise DTC linked to this network

I_BoosterSafetybag_CF.comment: Used to inhibite the safetybag function for I-booster, function present in some EV/PHEV/HEV vehicles

LDWMMI_CF.comment: used to defined if buzzer shall be played by cluster or not when LDW crossing alert occurs

NumberResetsCausedByFailuresGIP.comment: used to count the number of resets caused by failures (e.g. watchdog)

DevFrameAvailable_CF.comment: parameter indicates the presence or not of the development frames (gauging, XCP, auto dimming, ...).

CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number.comment: BUIC line number related to last stop alert (MBD parameter : CauseStop)
BUIC line number related to last service alert (MBD parameter : CauseService)

LayoutPresence_CF.Layout_NAV.comment: This parameter indicates the presence or not of the differents layouts

LayoutPresence_CF.Layout_ADAS.comment: This parameter indicates the presence or not of the differents layouts

GAU_SloshInhibitionStrategyActivation_CF.comment: This parameter is used to define if the slosh inhibition strategy is activated or not

lists.0: Trip Unit has been correctly configured
lists.1: Trip Unit has not been correctly configured

FuelReadjustL2ZeroSpeed_CF.comment: configuration parameter is used as threshold for L2ZeroSpeed readjustement mode (IGN ON mode):

FuelReadjustNearFullL0L3_CF.comment: This configuration is used as threshold for near full L0L3 readjustement(rental mode):

TripComputerSwitchAcqui_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define the trip computer switch acquisition strategy (Wire Or CAN)

GaugingThresholdHigh_CF.comment: parameter is used to select the Kmin/Kmaj parameters for the "high level or near full area":l

FuelReadjustL0L3_CF.comment: This configuration parameter is used as threshold for L0L3 readjustement mode (nominal mode):

FuelReadjustNearFullL0_CF.comment: parameter is used to define the near full area and select the associated readjustement mode:

BackupVolumeFuelWarning_CF.comment: This configuration parameter is used to trig the low fuel alert based on Lbackup signal

EthernetFunctionMMI_CF.Video.comment: used to know which ethernet features are managed by the cluster when the ethernet link is present

EthernetFunctionMMI_CF.Picture.comment: used to know which ethernet features are managed by the cluster when the ethernet link is present

EthernetFunctionMMI_CF.MexModelList.comment: used to know which ethernet features are managed by the cluster when the ethernet link is present

EthernetFunctionMMI_CF.ContinuousBackgro.comment: used to know which ethernet features are managed by the cluster when the ethernet link is present

MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay.comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in day.

TCI_RemainingDistanceDisappearanceThresh.comment: used to forbid the incrementation of the DTE (Distance To Empty or Autonomy in km).

TelltaleAutotestP2_CF.comment: This parameter is used to activate optional telltales autotest test when Ignition is switched ON.

MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget.comment: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = current odometer + distance before draining

MSCServ_DistanceForcedTarget.comment: This value is the odometer target when service is due

MSCGeneralOdoServiceTarget.comment: General Odometer value when service is due

MSCGeneralOdoOilChgTarget.comment: General Odometer value when oil draining is due

VNodeConfigurationError_Part1.comment: Not used, but for reserve (temp data for DDT2000)

TripComputerHWSwitchType_CF.comment: allows to address the steering wheel command diversity when the cluster is doing the acquisition

SecondRowFourthSafetyBelt_CF.comment: This configuration is used to know weither the 2nd row seats are 2/3 seats or 4 seats.

LuxSensor_1.comment: This parameter is used for reading the value of the lux sensor 1

ClusterCurrentDistanceByDIAG.comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance

DistUpdateByDiagCounter.comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

DistUpdateByExtECUCounter.comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU

LuxSensor_2.comment: This parameter is used for reading the value of the lux sensor 2

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max.comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq.comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

DisplayCapSide_EV_CF.comment: allows to identify where the electric cap is, in order to indicate the cap side on the cluster.
